engine.name: Advanced Offline Hybrid Recommender
engine.retrieval: TF-IDF + BM25 + offline semantic embeddings + numeric profile + quality/accommodation priors
engine.ranking: contextual scoring + embedding similarity + quality/popularity + local personalization + diversity
engine.baseline: basic exact keyword and filter matcher
